mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_login_log (user_type, user_id, account, login_time, login_ip, login_location, login_device, login_status, fail_reason, creator, updater, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.userType}, #{item.userId}, #{item.account}, #{item.loginTime}, #{item.loginIp}, #{item.loginLocation}, #{item.loginDevice}, #{item.loginStatus}, #{item.failReason}, #{item.creator}, #{item.updater}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
